type.title: Type

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the object was created.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated.

parent.description: Parent object link, or null when the object has no public parent.

job_description.title: Job Description
job_description.description: Optional job description used when the agent acts.

model.description: Effective model used by the agent. If the stored model is null, the configured default model is used.

type.title: Type
type.description: Public resource type for the case.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the object was created.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated.

parent.description: Parent object link, or null when the object has no public parent.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the case.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional detailed description or instructions for the case.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: Timestamp when the case was completed, if completed.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Optional generated or user-provided case summary.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: Optional caller-provided identifier for linking to an external system.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags assigned to the case, represented as simple names.

assignee.description: User assigned to the case, or null when unassigned.

files.title: Files
files.description: Files attached to the case, represented as public File links.

example.description: The ship's coffee machine started brewing decaf during lightspeed.

example.title: Investigate hyperspace coffee machine

model.title: Model
model.description: Optional model used by the agent. Set to null or omit to use the configured default model.

space_id.description: Target Space ID for a space-owned file. Provide at most one of space_id or case_id.

space_id.title: Space Id
space_id.description: Target Space ID. Provide exactly one of space_id or case_id.

case_id.title: Case Id
